Visual verification confirms 'Brought up.' is a header/label for the amount column, not an entry with its own amount. gpt-5-mini's interpretation of row_type is correct; gemini-flash incorrectly assigned amounts to this line.

gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amounts '73 2 6'. Visual check confirms description is 'Sub Renter C R' (gpt-5-mini's 'Subcurator C R' was close). gemini-flash completely missed this row, misaligning its subsequent entries.

Visually identified a missing row with no description text. The amount '19 5' (shillings, pence) is clearly visible, with the '1' in the shillings column and '5' in the pence column. Neither extractor accurately captured this standalone amount.

Visual verification confirms this is the first line of a braced group with no monetary amount on this line. gemini-flash's interpretation of no amount and description 'Ruin Water Arrears Duesons 2-14' is correct. gpt-5-mini's description 'River Water. Arrears Dickson' was less accurate.
Visual verification confirms this is the second line of the braced group with no monetary amount on this line. gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly assigned the braced amount to this line.
